title: Master's Program in Chemical Engineering (English) Mission and Vision
content:
Master's Program in Chemical Engineering (English) Mission and Vision

Mission

As a Chemical Engineering Master of Science Program, our main mission is to provide a high quality education at international level, produce scientific technologies at universal level. In addition, bringing an understanding of innovation and entrepreneurship is the other mission of Chemical Engineering Master of Science Program.

Vision

As the Chemical Engineering Master of Science Program at our university, our basic vision is to have academics with extensive knowledge and their strong academic potential who can take part in the search for solutions and related applications with a wide perspective, taking into account the environmental factors for the engineering problems they encounter within the scope of their professional responsibilities. To train chemical engineers who can contribute to the development of science and technology and meet the expectations of business, industry and society.
